cauliflower-cheese: baked cauliflower with browned cheese on top, bits of ham and onion — right dish, hero-worthy
cauliflower-cheese-soup: whole raw cauliflower head with a small bowl of cauliflower rice, not the soup
celeriac-and-apple-soup: pale cream root-vegetable soup with croutons and dill — reads as the dish, hero-worthy
chai-spiced-overnight-oats: cup of chai latte with whole spices and honey — wrong form, this is a drink not overnight oats
chana-masala: dry uncooked chickpeas spilling from a jar, not the Indian curry
cheddar-broccoli-rice-cups: two wooden scoops of salt or sugar, completely off-topic
cheddar-rosemary-spiralized-potato-panca: phone-snap of hands prepping sliced potatoes in a pan — in-progress, not the cooked dish
cheese-on-toast: yellow-cast photo of unmelted shredded cheese on dark bread — unusable composition
cheese-scones: sweet fruit scones with cranberries, not savory cheese scones
cheese-scones-cheddar: same fruit-scone image — not savory cheese scones
cheese-straws: glass jar of flour spilling, completely wrong dish
cheeseburger: double cheeseburger with bacon and melted cheese held in hands — strong editorial hero
chermoula-sea-bass: raw sea bass on ice at a fish market with price tags
chicken-and-dumplings: Asian wonton dumplings with chili oil and scallions — wrong cuisine
chicken-and-mushroom-pie: lattice-top apple pie (dessert), not a savory chicken pie
chicken-bhuna: whole chicken leg/thigh in a brown curry sauce — reads as chicken bhuna; bright green wood background is quirky but the dish is right
chicken-caesar-salad: chicken Caesar with romaine, croutons, parmesan and dressing — clean hero
chicken-chasseur: in-progress browning of chicken pieces in a pan — chasseur is the finished tomato/mushroom/wine sauce, not the sear step
chicken-fajitas: sliced grilled chicken with peppers and onions on a cast-iron skillet — right dish
chicken-fried-steak: sliced medium-rare beef steak with fries — chicken-fried steak is breaded cubed steak with cream gravy; also a restaurant 'doughbai' branding on the plate
chicken-gyoza: cookie dough with shaped cookie cutters, completely off-topic
chicken-jalfrezi: same browning-step pan image as chasseur — jalfrezi is a thick tomato-pepper curry, not plain seared chicken
chicken-katsu-curry: breaded sliced chicken cutlet on Japanese curry with rice — hero-quality
chicken-korma: spaghetti with grilled chicken and olives — not the creamy mild Indian curry
chicken-noodle-soup: chicken noodle soup with carrots and celery in clear broth — right dish, hero-worthy
chicken-paprikash: chicken in paprika cream sauce with spaetzle and pickles — Hungarian paprikash, right dish
chicken-pesto-pasta-salad: pesto pasta with grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes and arugula — right dish
chicken-pot-pie: whole roast chicken on a board, not the savory pie with pastry crust
chicken-shawarma: brand-tagged 'Shawarma King' takeaway box on branded packaging — restaurant branding makes it unusable
chicken-tagine-with-preserved-lemon: same brown-curry chicken image as bhuna; tagine specifically requires visible preserved lemon wedges and Moroccan styling
chicken-tikka-masala: plain grilled chicken pieces in a pan with sausages behind — missing the iconic creamy orange masala sauce
chicken-wrapped-in-parma-ham: fajitas-style grilled chicken with tortilla wraps and peppers — no parma ham wrapping visible
